'''Jamson Caglio''' was the [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of the [[Bormea sector/Legends|Bormea sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. While not on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Caglio resided in [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag's]] capital of [[Curamelle/Legends|Curamelle]].

==Biography==
Caglio rose to his high post, despite his mild manner and [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] sensibilities, by being useful to the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]], while not displaying dangerous ambitions. He was an early supporter of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], and spent most of his time on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] advising him, leaving day-to-day operations of sector government to [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Zafiel Snopps]] of [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]].

Shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Caglio supported [[Gerald Weizel]]'s appointment as Governor of [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]]. This was a significant victory for Weizel's patron, [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Rufaan Tigellinus]], as Caglio had been a longtime supporter of one of Tigellinus's opponents, Grand Moff [[Traeda]].

He was the father of [[Vastin Caglio]].
